issue.body:

transcript.Body:
GitClaw heartbeat e2e 20260531T175057Z

Live heartbeat E2E.

When the heartbeat workflow runs, reply with exact token `GITCLAW_HEARTBEAT_E2E_20260531T175057Z`.
Also include the exact heartbeat context token from `.gitclaw/HEARTBEAT.md`.
Keep it short.

@gitclaw Heartbeat follow-up E2E conversation check.

Use the repo-reader skill and search the repository for `heartbeat followup unique search fixture phrase`.
The matching gitclaw.search_files result line uses this format: phrase => TOKEN.
Copy the exact TOKEN after the arrow. It must start with `GITCLAW_HEARTBEAT_FOLLOWUP_`; do not reply with the search phrase.
Reply in exactly these three short labeled lines:
heartbeat: GITCLAW_HEARTBEAT_E2E_20260531T175057Z
context: GITCLAW_HEARTBEAT_CONTEXT_V1
followup_search: <TOKEN from the matching gitclaw.search_files line>
Do not use @file or @folder references.

heartbeat: GITCLAW_HEARTBEAT_E2E_20260531T175057Z
context: GITCLAW_HEARTBEAT_CONTEXT_V1
followup_search: GITCLAW_HEARTBEAT_FOLLOWUP_CONTEXT_V1
